rbaHistory.note: First cut since Nov 2020 — CPI back in 2-3% band
Held; trimmed mean CPI above target
Held; Q1 CPI surprised to upside

news.title: ASX bounces back on renewed Iran talk hopes; BHP jumps on China concessions
news.snippet: The Australian sharemarket advanced as Donald Trump raised hopes for an Iran deal, and BHP gained on reports of progress in its months-long iron ore tussle with China.

news.title: Trump move rocks Aussie sharemarket
news.snippet: Gold miners and tech stocks have dragged the ASX 200 down, but oil has soared after US President Donald Trump ordered a blockade of the Strait of Hormuz.

news.title: ASX jumps on US, Iran peace talks
news.snippet: Australia’s sharemarket has briefly hit the psychological 9000-point milestone as traders welcomed signs of potential Middle East peace talks.

news.title: ‘Clock is ticking’: Grim recession warning
news.snippet: An “inflation mentality” that could soon flood the Australian economy has sparked fears of an imminent recession, a leading economist warns.

news.title: Albo flags move on controversial Aussie tax
news.snippet: Anthony Albanese has given the strongest indication yet Labor could seek to scrap a controversial housing tax break at next month’s budget.

news.title: Higher fares, fewer flights: Qantas goes into damage control
news.snippet: The airline is pulling every operational and pricing lever to blunt the hit on its profits resulting from the Iran war, which has blown out its jet fuel costs by hundreds of millions of dollars.

news.title: Sydney community radio station 2SER could shutter in July as funds run out
news.snippet: The radio broadcaster could close its doors after more than 45 years, having failed to secure rescue funds after one of its two main financial backers walked away.

news.title: ‘Shock’ super collapse costs Aussies $160m
news.snippet: The hopes and dreams of 660 hard-working Aussies have been crushed after a superannuation scheme collapsed into liquidation.

news.title: The tech jobs bust is real. Don’t blame AI (yet)
news.snippet: Worries about a tech-jobs AI-mageddon spread far beyond Silicon Valley. But what’s really behind the lay-off in the technology sector?

news.title: Viking eyes quick cash from Nevada tungsten project stockpiles
news.snippet: Viking Mines has kicked off fieldwork at its Linka tungsten project in Nevada, targeting low-cost reprocessing of historic tailings and stockpiles amid surging prices.

news.title: Hastings lines up African feedstock for Thai rare earths plant
news.snippet: Hastings Technology Metals has stitched up an African monazite supply for its new Thai hydromet plant, aiming to fast-track rare earths production and cash flow by year’s end.

news.title: Critica met test lands 81% magnet rare earths recovery in WA
news.snippet: Critica Limited has lifted pilot plant rare earths recoveries for its Jupiter project in WA, hitting 71% TREO and 81% for the valuable magnet rare earths oxides.
